latest_release.body:
## Release Overview

Stable release for `s3ctl`.

- Published tag: [`v0.1.1`](https://github.com/soakes/s3ctl/releases/tag/v0.1.1)
- Full diff: [`v0.1.0...v0.1.1`](https://github.com/soakes/s3ctl/compare/v0.1.0...v0.1.1)

## Included Changes

### Fixes

- Refresh pages site after release assets ([`92b18c7`](https://github.com/soakes/s3ctl/commit/92b18c7f7b0c785c0897ae7dfb49f6615d582dbc))

- Publish curated release notes ([`f1d8669`](https://github.com/soakes/s3ctl/commit/f1d86693e30a0eb90661dee679b581e38b0d26d3))

- Align favicon with release site branding ([`4138352`](https://github.com/soakes/s3ctl/commit/41383525a88e491e8317d20afe9522a6d302a65d))

### CI and Automation

- Bump actions/download-artifact from 6 to 8 ([`477ac5c`](https://github.com/soakes/s3ctl/commit/477ac5c5c4428ff24dee268088e2f16dec9ea311))
  - Automatically merged after Build and Validate completed successfully for this Dependabot pull request.

- Bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2 to 3 ([`f560ae3`](https://github.com/soakes/s3ctl/commit/f560ae3cd3d848f819d9f046a8448c367393f70d))
  - Automatically merged after Build and Validate completed successfully for this Dependabot pull request.

## Published Artifacts

- Release binaries for `linux/amd64`, `linux/arm64`, `linux/arm/v7`, `darwin/amd64`, and `darwin/arm64`
- Debian packages for `amd64`, `arm64`, and `armhf`
- SHA256 checksums attached to the release
- Container images published to `ghcr.io/soakes/s3ctl`
- The GitHub Pages release hub is refreshed with install commands, release assets, and APT repository metadata
